_comment: A simulated file system tree, NOT real disk access (browsers can't do that). VFS.js loads this once and exposes it via resolve()/listDir()/readFile(). Every 'file' node either points to an assetKey (resolved later through AssetManager, e.g. for a PDF or image file) or carries inline 'content' for simple text files. Nothing in here is a raw hardcoded asset path.
name: root

children.name: Read Me.txt
children.content:
Windows Prism JSK

This is a simulated file system used to power the Explorer app. Nothing here touches your real computer's disk -- it is in-memory data loaded once from data/vfs.json.
